hero.headline: AI Engineered
hero.subheadline: We craft digital experiences where cutting-edge artificial intelligence meets human ambition.

about.title: A Vision Beyond Code
about.description: HoldingAI is not a typical digital agency. We are an engineering and design lab dedicated to building the next generation of intelligent platforms. We merge luxury aesthetics with the raw power of artificial intelligence.
about.missionText: We believe the most advanced technology should feel invisible. Our systems are designed to operate with absolute fluidity, offering your users an experience bordering on magic. From data architecture to the finest pixel, every detail is obsessively perfected.

work.title: Our Work
work.description: Discover our digital monuments. From Apple-quality web applications to enterprise-grade AI systems, we redefine industry standards.

contact.title: Let's Build
contact.description: Ready to lead the AI revolution? Describe your project and our engineering team will contact you within 24 hours.

aiAgents.title: Autonomous AI Agents
aiAgents.description: We develop intelligent agents capable of reasoning, learning, and executing complex tasks autonomously.
aiAgents.feature1Desc: Our agents adapt and improve with every interaction, guaranteeing constant evolution of your performance.
aiAgents.feature2Desc: Beyond simple text generation, our systems integrate advanced reasoning capabilities to solve business problems.
aiAgents.feature3Desc: Seamless integration with your APIs allowing agents to act directly within your ecosystem.

saas.title: Scalable SaaS Development
saas.description: Cutting-edge software architectures designed to support millions of users while providing a fluid experience.
saas.feature1Desc: Cloud-native infrastructure guaranteed at 99.99% uptime, built for hyper-growth.
saas.feature2Desc: End-to-end encryption and total compliance with the strictest security standards (GDPR, SOC2).
saas.feature3Desc: Clean, intuitive, and visually stunning interfaces that retain your users.

automation.title: Enterprise Automation
automation.description: Eliminate friction. We transform your manual processes into automated, fast, and error-free workflows.
automation.feature1Desc: We connect your existing tools (CRM, ERP, databases) to create perfect synergy.
automation.feature2Desc: Drastically reduce your operational costs by automating time-consuming tasks.
automation.feature3Desc: Analytical dashboards to monitor the efficiency of your automations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: At HoldingAI LTD, we take your privacy seriously. We collect minimal data necessary to provide our services. This includes your name, email, and project details submitted via our contact form. We do not sell or share your data with third parties. To request the deletion of your data, please contact us at info@holdingai.io.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.content: By using our services, you agree to these terms. HoldingAI LTD provides software development and AI engineering services 'as is'. We are not liable for data loss or service interruptions. All intellectual property rights to the deliverables are transferred to you only upon full payment of invoices.

mentions.title: Legal Mentions
mentions.content: Site Publisher: HoldingAI LTD, registered in England & Wales. Registered Office: Lytchett House, Freeland Park, Wareham Road, Poole, Dorset, UK. Contact: info@holdingai.io | +44 7537106967. Hosted by: Vercel Inc.
